Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails with a query related to "Jordan" or "referral partner" or "Carlos Rivera" (or similar) using search_emails to find Jordan Blake's email to Grace Yamamoto reporting that multiple realtor partners do not want new buyer files assigned to Carlos and are specifically asking who else on the team they can work with. Also discover Grace Yamamoto's email to Carlos formally scheduling his performance review for Wednesday morning, citing ongoing concerns with production results, pipeline health, file quality, responsiveness to processing, rate lock management, and partner feedback.
OE 2: Search emails with a query related to "Kendra Lawson" or "Alicia Grant" (or similar) using search_emails to find the referral dispute thread. Agent discovers Carlos's email to Grace documenting that Alicia Grant referred Kendra Lawson to him and he set the file up as a partner referral (LN-2026-00192), Derek Moss's email to Grace claiming Kendra told him she came to him directly first, Hana Kim's email placing the commission payout on hold pending Grace's final assignment decision, and Grace's reply stating she is opening an evidence review and instructing everyone to hold pipeline ownership changes while she reconciles the referral email, CRM entries, and phone timing.
OE 3: Search emails with a query related to "Destiny" or "viral" or "closing complaint" (or similar) using search_emails to find the viral closing incident involving Carlos. Agent discovers a Charlotte Observer reporter's email to info@keystonemortgage.com requesting comment on a social media thread from a borrower describing delays and communication issues at a recent Keystone closing, with a same-day response deadline.
OE 4: Search Slack messages with a query related to "Kendra Lawson" or "referral" or "Carlos" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages to find relevant activity in #sales-pipeline (C006). Agent discovers Derek Moss's message saying Kendra Lawson told him she came to him directly, Carlos's message about setting up Kendra Lawson from Alicia Grant and marking it as his referral in LOS, Carlos's follow-up questioning why Kendra is showing under Derek in the pipeline, and Hana Kim's message putting the comp on hold until Grace rules on ownership.
OE 5: Search CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements or search CRM contacts using crm_search_contacts with a query related to "Carlos" or "Kendra" or "referral" (or similar) to find engagement notes relevant to Carlos's pipeline and partner situation. Agent discovers the note about Jordan tracking increased handoff hesitation from agents on Carlos's referrals, the $0 funded commission note for the last 60 days, the referral note from Carlos's call with Jordan about the Alicia Grant referral to Kendra Lawson, and the attribution issue note about Jordan being pulled in after the LO dispute.
OE 6: Search CRM deals using crm_search_deals with a query related to "Carlos Rivera" (or similar) to review the current status of Carlos's active pipeline and determine where his deals actually stand. Agent discovers the state of his active deals and can confirm whether his pipeline is stalled.
OE 7: Look up Brian Foster's contact information using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Brian Foster" or similar) to confirm his email address is brian.foster@mac.com before sending the outreach email.
OE 8: Send an email using send_email with sender carlos.rivera@keystonemortgage.com and recipient brian.foster@mac.com. The email should be a warm, professional check-in that maintains the referral relationship without sounding desperate, consistent with Brian being Carlos's steadiest referral source for FHA and first-time buyer referrals.
OE 9: Send an email using send_email with sender carlos.rivera@keystonemortgage.com and recipient jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com. The email should communicate that Carlos is getting ahead of the referral partner situation and wants to sit down with Jordan before the Wednesday performance review with Grace.
OE 10: Create a CRM engagement using crm_create_engagement logging the key findings from the investigation, including partner feedback from Jordan, pipeline status, the Kendra Lawson referral dispute, and the Destiny closing fallout.
OE 11: Post a message to #sales-pipeline (channel C006) using conversations_add_message summarizing that Carlos is proactively addressing the referral partner concerns, so the team has visibility into his responsiveness on the issue.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

5 The email to [brian.foster@mac.com](mailto:brian.foster@mac.com) (visible in `send_email` parameters) is a check-in that references the referral relationship or partnership between Carlos and Brian (e.g., mentioning past referrals, FHA buyers, first-time buyers, or the value of their working relationship, or similar).
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The email content to brian.foster@mac.com explicitly references the referral relationship: 'I always appreciate the trust you put in Keystone when you send buyers our way. Your referrals mean a lot to me personally' and 'Thanks again for the partnership, Brian.' This is warm and relationship-focused, not desperate.
✓Run #2The email to brian.foster@mac.com explicitly states 'You've been one of my most reliable partners and I genuinely appreciate the trust you put in me when you send buyers my way' — directly referencing the referral relationship in a warm, non-desperate tone.
✓Run #3The email content to brian.foster@mac.com explicitly references 'the steady partnership over the years,' acknowledges Brian 'has got options when it comes to who you send people to,' and offers to make his clients' experience better — clearly a relationship-maintenance check-in referencing the referral partnership.
✓Run #4The email to brian.foster@mac.com explicitly references 'we've had a few files move through together over the past year and I really value the working relationship we've built' and mentions routing buyers. It references the referral partnership warmly without desperation.
✓Run #5The email content to brian.foster@mac.com includes: 'I've been thinking about the files we've worked on together and I appreciate you consistently bringing solid buyers to the table. That kind of partnership matters to me.' This references the referral relationship warmly without being desperate.
✓Run #6The email content to Brian Foster explicitly states 'You've been one of my most reliable referral sources and I don't take that for granted,' directly referencing the referral partnership. The tone is warm and natural, not desperate.
6 The email to [jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com](mailto:jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com) (visible in `send_email` parameters) mentions that Carlos is getting ahead of the referral partner situation and wants to sit down or meet with Jordan before the Wednesday review with Grace.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The email to jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com clearly states 'I want to get ahead of this before my review with Grace on Wednesday' and 'Can we find 20-30 minutes before then to sit down?' Both the proactive stance on the partner situation and the request to meet before the Wednesday review are present.
✓Run #2The email to jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com says 'I'm putting together a plan to tighten up my follow-up cadence and rebuild where things have slipped. Before my review with Grace on Wednesday, I'd like to sit down with you' — both required elements (proactive stance on partner situation and request to meet before the review) are present.
✓Run #3The email to jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com explicitly states 'I'm getting ahead of the partner situation and want to sit down before the review' and asks 'Can we sit down before Wednesday?' while referencing the review with Grace on Wednesday.
✓Run #4The email to jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com states 'I'm taking it seriously' regarding partner feedback (getting ahead of the situation) and explicitly asks 'Would you have time to sit down with me before my review with Grace on Wednesday?' — both required elements are present.
✓Run #5The email to jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com explicitly states: 'I'm taking the partner feedback seriously...I'd rather get in front of it than wait for it to come up in my review with Grace on Wednesday...Would you have 20-30 minutes tomorrow or Tuesday to sit down?' Both required elements are present.
✓Run #6The email to Jordan says 'I want to get ahead of this before my sit-down with Grace on Wednesday' and 'Can we find 30 minutes tomorrow or early Wednesday to go through it?' Both required elements—proactive stance on the partner situation and a request to meet before Wednesday—are present.
7 The CRM engagement note (visible in `crm_create_engagement` parameters) includes findings about Jordan Blake's partner feedback, specifically that realtor partners are hesitant or refusing to send new buyer referrals to Carlos.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The CRM engagement body explicitly states: 'PARTNER COMPLAINTS (via Jordan Blake, BDM): Three referral partners in the last two weeks have requested not to route new buyers to Carlos. Main complaints: missed follow-up, messy updates, blown expectations after contract. Jordan logged initial notes in CRM and escalated to sales-pipeline channel.'
